g.title: rating.badge:scope->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (scope) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: rating.badge:src_filter->config.bib_source:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (src_filter) REFERENCES config.bib_source(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: rating.badge:circ_mod_filter->config.circ_modifier:code
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (circ_mod_filter) REFERENCES config.circ_modifier(code) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: rating.badge:loc_grp_filter->asset.copy_location_group:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (loc_grp_filter) REFERENCES asset.copy_location_group(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: rating.badge:popularity_parameter->rating.popularity_parameter:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (popularity_parameter) REFERENCES rating.popularity_parameter(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: rating.record_badge_score:badge->rating.badge:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (badge) REFERENCES rating.badge(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
